meanings.definition: be earlier in time; go back further

examples: Most English adjectives precede the noun they modify
Bill preceded John in the long line of Susan's husbands

meanings.definition: move ahead (of others) in time or space
furnish with a preface or introduction
examples: She always precedes her lectures with a joke
He prefaced his lecture with a critical remark about the institution

meanings.definition: of a person who has held and relinquished a position or office
examples: a retiring member of the board
